title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.371 - Sale of injurious or deleterious substance unlawful
text:
266.371.  Sale of injurious or deleterious substance unlawful. — It shall be unlawful for any person to sell, offer for sale, or expose for sale any soil conditioner in this state containing any substance that is injurious to crop growth or deleterious to the soil.
(L. 1965 p. 394 § 2)
